title: Test: Add performance benchmark tests
original_text: Added performance benchmark tests to measure response times under load. Created benchmarks for database queries, API endpoints, and data processing pipelines. Tests measure latency, throughput, and memory usage. Added baseline measurements and regression detection. Updated tests/test_performance.py. Result: 18 benchmarks pass, performance within acceptable limits.
expected_body_lines: - Create benchmarks for database queries and API endpoints
- Measure latency, throughput, and memory usage
- Add baseline measurements and regression detection
expected_command: git commit -m "test(perf): add performance benchmark tests"
